name: self-harness
description: Portable agent skill for improving agent harnesses with live simulated users and Self-Harness trace mining.

interface.shortDescription: Improve agent harnesses with simulated users.
interface.longDescription: Runs a paper-grounded Self-Harness workflow inside target repos: the host agent reasons from repo evidence, confirms audience, simulates representative AI users, mines traces, proposes code changes, and validates owner-approved changes.
defaultPrompt: Use Self-Harness to evaluate this agent harness.
Simulate realistic users and propose harness improvements.
Mine traces from this agent and find failure clusters.
